hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git (commit|push|merge)' && echo "$branch" | grep -qE '^(main|master)$'; then echo "BLOCKED: Cannot commit/push/merge directly on $branch. Create a feature branch first." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); file_path=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$file_path" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$file_path" in *.py) cd /Users/crewmaty/OpenLearning/backend && ruff format "$file_path" 2>/dev/null; exit 0;; *.ts|*.tsx) cd /Users/crewmaty/OpenLearning/frontend && npx eslint --fix "$file_path" 2>/dev/null; exit 0;; esac; exit 0

input=$(cat); file_path=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$file_path" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$file_path" in *.py) cd /Users/crewmaty/OpenLearning/backend && ruff check "$file_path" 2>&1 >&2; exit 0;; esac; exit 0

branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); commits=$(git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null || echo 'no commits'); echo "GIT_BRANCH=$branch" >> "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE"; echo "RECENT_COMMITS<<EOF" >> "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE"; echo "$commits" >> "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE"; echo "EOF" >> "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE"

hooks.prompt: Before finishing, verify: Have you linted and tested all changed files? Run `make check` if you made code changes across both stacks, or the appropriate stack-specific commands (ruff check/pytest for Python, eslint/vitest for TypeScript).
